hero.subtitle1: Tingkatkan bisnis Anda dengan perangkat lunak kelas dunia
hero.subtitle2: Stabil, mudah digunakan dan memenuhi semua kebutuhan

services.heading: Layanan
services.description: Layanan perangkat lunak lengkap dari konsultasi, desain, pengembangan hingga dukungan purna jual
services.dev_desc: Mendesain dan mengembangkan perangkat lunak sesuai kebutuhan untuk Web, Mobile dan Desktop
services.rental_desc: Layanan sewa perangkat lunak siap pakai, terjangkau untuk semua bisnis
services.consult_desc: Konsultasi IT Solution, perencanaan sistem dan rekomendasi teknologi
services.mobile_desc: Mengembangkan aplikasi mobile iOS dan Android
services.web_desc: Desain dan pengembangan semua jenis website
services.db_desc: Desain, kembangkan dan kelola sistem database

photobooth.description: Layanan sewa photobooth gaya Korea dengan perangkat lunak sendiri. Cocok untuk Event, Pernikahan, Peluncuran Produk.

showcase.heading: Portofolio
showcase.description: Contoh proyek yang telah kami kembangkan untuk klien
showcase.project1_desc: Aplikasi antrian untuk klinik dan toko
showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution designed to handle events of all sizes, from small gatherings to large corporate events.
showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant photo printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
showcase.project1_detail: A back-office system that enables teams to manage sales data, reports and analytics efficiently, directly connected to the photobooth system with real-time data display.
showcase.project1_features: Real-time dashboard, Daily/monthly sales reports, User management, Export to Excel/PDF, Smart notifications, Data backup system
showcase.project2_detail: An enterprise hub platform consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place.
showcase.project2_features: Task management, HR & Leave management, Internal chat, Document management, Performance reporting, Single Sign-On
showcase.project3_detail: A full-featured online sales platform supporting both B2C and B2B with product management, inventory, order handling, and secure payment processing.
showcase.project3_features: Advanced product management, Shopping cart & payments, Order management, Promotions system, Sales reports, Product reviews

contact.description: Tim ahli kami siap mendengarkan dan memberikan saran
contact.form_subtitle: Isi detail di bawah dan tim kami akan menghubungi Anda

footer.description: Spesialis perangkat lunak photobooth dengan layanan lengkap
